mission_brief.title: Checkout Conversion Drop
mission_brief.problem: Late-January completed orders have softened across key Indian metros while major competitors continue to hold steady.
mission_brief.objective: Investigate ZaikaNow's drop in orders by querying analytics, UX research, and engineering teammates. Build an evidence-backed root-cause analysis and recommend a recovery plan.
notes: Each teammate sees only their own operational domain.
Strong answers cross-reference evidence instead of relying on a single agent.
The longer history includes baseline, disruption, partial recovery, and downstream trust effects.

sources.name: orders.csv
sources.description: Order attempts with status, INR amount, platform, city, and created_at timestamp.

fields.name: city
fields.description: bengaluru / mumbai / delhi_ncr / hyderabad / pune / chennai.

sources.name: payments.csv
sources.description: Payment attempts with method, provider, status, city, platform, and processing time.

fields.name: error_code
fields.description: Observed error code when a payment attempt does not complete cleanly.

sources.name: sessions_events.csv
sources.description: Session-level product events used to reconstruct browse-to-order funnel behavior.

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: app_open -> restaurant_view -> add_to_cart -> checkout_start -> payment_attempt -> order_complete.

fields.name: city
fields.description: Metro city observed during the session.

fields.name: app_version
fields.description: App version observed during the event.

sources.name: users.csv
sources.description: Customer profile data including signup date, platform, city, and user type.

fields.name: signup_date
fields.description: Date the customer first signed up.

sources.name: reviews.csv
sources.description: Customer reviews with ratings, platform, city, and free-text feedback.

sources.name: support_tickets.csv
sources.description: Support tickets with issue category, city, priority, and operational status.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Ticket category such as payment, checkout, delivery, or promo.

sources.name: usability_study.md
sources.description: Moderated usability research notes focused on checkout and UPI reliability.

sources.name: ux_changelog.csv
sources.description: Recent UX changes, experiments, and bugfixes across checkout and discovery flows.

fields.name: affected_area
fields.description: Product area touched by the change.

sources.name: deployments.csv
sources.description: Deployment history with service, description, and rollback availability.

sources.name: service_metrics.csv
sources.description: Service latency and error-rate metrics by service and date.

sources.name: payment_errors_summary.csv
sources.description: Aggregated payment error patterns by code, platform, and date.

sources.name: system_architecture.md
sources.description: System topology, payment path, and operational architecture notes.

glossary.definition: Share of sessions that ultimately complete an order.
A delayed or missing payment confirmation after the customer approves the transaction in the banking app.
High-frequency customer segment with repeat ordering behavior.
